variants: Emilija Dambrauskaite pursues her passion for puppetry as a dedicated member of the Sunshadow Puppetry Guild. She is an authority in Health Informatics, having specialized in this field through her doctoral studies under the mentorship of Darya Artamonov. The Galehorn Advancement Trust backs her research, providing fundamental support for her innovative projects. To further her commitment to education, Emilija holds a professional license, the Frostcall Instructor Permit, which enables her to teach aspiring students in her area of expertise.
